testcase.name: create user company from singapore
testcase.system-out: Given go to main web........................................................passed Given press sign in button..................................................passed When registration with new account yopmail and login........................passed Then will redirected to suggested company list which match with domain name of the users.passed When system didn't found the suggested company matched......................passed And input company name "Test" from "SG - SINGAPORE" dynamics................passed And input company registration "SGCOM"......................................passed And input company type "GSA"................................................passed And input country "SG - SINGAPORE"..........................................passed And input city "SIN - SINGAPORE"............................................passed And theres button to create company with the status was enabled to create company.passed Then the user was able to create a new company..............................passed When press create company button............................................passed And input contact details IATA membership number "1234567"..................passed And input contact details CASS number "1234"................................passed And input registered office address "101 Cantonment road" for company detail.passed And input post code "089774" for company detail.............................passed And input company email "sg@yopmail.com" for company detail.................passed And input mobile number detail company "1111111111" for company detail......passed And input mailing address complete from same as registered company address..passed And input contact details name "singapore admin"............................passed And input contact details designation "admin"...............................passed And input contact details mobile no "081234567891"..........................passed And input contact details email "sgsin@yopmail.com".........................passed And press submit create company.............................................passed Then will displayed pop up for post payment setup...........................passed And click proceed pop up button for creating company to the post payment....passed And click ok button from pop up confirmation that tells GIRO setup instructions has been sent to email.passed Then finally successfully to the setup post payment.........................passed And receive email notification giro setup...................................passed
